title: YOUNG ADULTS IN TRANSITION - 211info
text: DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH YOUNG ADULTS IN TRANSITION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Young Adults in Transition (YAT) provides support services for young adults who suffer from mental health or behavioral challenges. YAT Teams establish relationships with young adults, families and peers, and all available support systems. Transitional treatment and intervention help young adults graduate school, continue education, find employment, maintain friendships, and gain independence. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Ages 14-24 who are involved with the juvenile justice system, Department of Human Services currently homeless, or live in a foster home. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 213-6851 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 213-6851 Program Development Specialist Shannon Brister Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Deschutes County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Age Peer Networking * Mental Health Issues Youth Employment Programs * Mental Health Issues Youth Enrichment Programs * Mental Health Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DESCHUTES COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SENIORS MENTAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
